passives.name: Opening Barrage
passives.effects: After casting your ultimate ability, your next 3 basic attacks within 8 seconds gain {{as|50% '''bonus''' attack speed}} and will {{tip|critically strike}} for{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|60|80}}|critical damage}} '''bonus''' damage.|{{sti|{{as|80% '''total''' critical damage}}}}.}}If an attack would have already critically struck, it instead critically strikes for{{ft|{{as|{{critical damage|100|100}}|critical damage}} '''bonus''' damage|{{sti|{{as|100% '''total''' critical damage}}}}}}and deals {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} equal to 15% of the triggering {{as|attack's damage}}.

effects_structured.raw: After casting your ultimate ability, your next 3 basic attacks within 8 seconds gain {{as 50% '''bonus''' attack speed}} and will {{tip critically strike}} for{{ft {{as {{critical damage 60 80}} critical damage}} '''bonus''' damage

{{sti {{as 80% '''total''' critical damage}}}}.}}If an attack would have already critically struck, it instead critically strikes for{{ft {{as {{critical damage 100 100}} critical damage}} '''bonus''' damage {{sti {{as 100% '''total''' critical damage}}}}}}and deals {{as '''bonus''' true damage}} equal to 15% of the triggering {{as attack's damage}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Opening Barrage affects next 3 basic attacks within 8 seconds after ultimate cast.
Fiendhunter Bolts is modeled as an ultimate-synergy marksman burst window: temporary attack-speed and crit enhancement with conditional true-damage amplification on already-critical hits.
